CREATE TABLE test_alphaTokens (id UInt32, text String);
SELECT id, alphaTokens(text) AS tokens FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE text LIKE '%a%';
SELECT id, alphaTokens(text, 2) AS tokens FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE text NOT LIKE '%1%';
SELECT id, alphaTokens(text, 3) AS tokens FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE text LIKE 'H%');
SELECT id, alphaTokens(text, 4) AS tokens FROM (SELECT text FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE id > 2) AS subquery;
SELECT DISTINCT id, alphaTokens(text, 1) FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE text LIKE '%C%');
SELECT id, alphaTokens(text, 0) AS tokens FROM test_alphaTokens ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT id, alphaTokens(text, 5) AS tokens FROM test_alphaTokens WHERE LENGTH(text) > 5;
